sections.text:
**Last Updated: 25.05.2025**

These Terms and Conditions govern the purchase of 
original artworks from Maeve Vamy, a professional artist based in 
Bulgaria, European Union. By purchasing artwork through this website, 
you agree to be bound by these terms.

## **About the Artist and Business**

Maeve Vamy operates as an independent artist based in 
Bulgaria, EU. All artworks are original creations by the artist, 
primarily executed in oil on canvas, featuring both realistic and 
abstract styles.

## **Artwork Information and Pricing**

All artworks displayed on this website are original, one-of-a-kind pieces created by the artist. Each listing includes:

*   Title, dimensions, and medium

*   Year of creation

*   Detailed photographs

*   Price in EUR (all prices include VAT where applicable)

*   Authenticity guarantee

Prices are subject to change without notice until payment is confirmed.

## **Ordering and Payment**

**EU Customers:** You have the right to 
withdraw from this contract within 14 days without giving any reason, in
 accordance with EU Consumer Protection Directive.



**Payment Methods:** We accept major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers. Payment must be completed before artwork shipment.



**Order Confirmation:** You will receive email confirmation of your order and payment. This constitutes acceptance of your purchase.

## **Shipping and Delivery**

**Delivery Timeline:** Artworks will be shipped within 30 days of payment confirmation, unless otherwise agreed.



**EU Shipping:** No additional customs documentation required for shipments within the European Union.



**International Shipping:** For shipments outside the EU:

*   Export invoices and customs documentation will be provided

*   Buyers are responsible for any import duties, taxes, or customs fees

*   Artworks are classified under harmonized tariff code 9701100000

**Packaging:** All artworks are professionally packaged with appropriate protective materials and insurance.

## **Returns and Exchanges**

**EU Consumer Rights:** EU customers may 
return artwork within 14 days of delivery for any reason. Return 
shipping costs are buyer's responsibility unless the artwork was damaged
 or misrepresented.



**International Returns:** Returns accepted within 7 days of delivery for damaged or misrepresented items only.



**Condition:** Returned artworks must be in original condition and packaging.

## **Cultural Heritage and Export Compliance**

As an EU-based artist, we comply with Regulation 
2019/880 regarding cultural goods. Contemporary artworks by living 
artists generally do not require special export permits, but we maintain
 proper documentation for all international shipments.

## **Intellectual Property**

The artist retains all copyright and intellectual 
property rights to the artwork design. Purchase includes ownership of 
the physical artwork only, not reproduction rights unless specifically 
agreed in writing.

## **Authenticity Guarantee**

All artworks come with a certificate of authenticity 
signed by the artist. This guarantees the work is original and created 
by Maeve Vamy.

## **Limitation of Liability**

Our liability is limited to the purchase price of the artwork. We are not responsible for:

*   Damage during shipping (covered by insurance)

*   Import restrictions in destination countries

*   Changes in artwork appearance due to lighting or aging

## **Privacy and Data Protection**

We comply with GDPR regulations for all customer data. 
Personal information is used only for order processing and 
communication. We do not share customer data with third parties except 
as required for shipping and payment processing.

## **Force Majeure**

We are not liable for delays or inability to perform due
 to circumstances beyond our control, including but not limited to 
natural disasters, government actions, or shipping disruptions.

## **Governing Law**

These terms are governed by Bulgarian law and EU 
regulations. Any disputes will be resolved in Bulgarian courts, except 
EU consumers may pursue claims in their country of residence.

## **Contact Information**

**Artist:** Maeve Vamy
**Location:** Bulgaria, European Union
**Email:** swoosh\@vamy.art

## **Modifications**

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. 
Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use 
of the website constitutes acceptance of modified terms.



*By completing a purchase, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms and Conditions.*
